changes: Slimmed SKILL.md from ~200 lines (editing/redlining/ooxml workflows) to ~60 lines focused on creation and extraction only
Added --wrap=none to pandoc text extraction commands to prevent line-wrapping that split table cells and long text across lines
Slimmed docx-js.md from ~350 lines to ~100 lines with only essential API patterns (headings, text, bullet lists, tables)
Removed ooxml.md (~600 lines), ooxml/ directory (30+ XSD schemas), and scripts/ directory (Python editing tools) - not needed for creation/extraction tasks
Added quick example in SKILL.md showing complete document creation workflow
Added python-docx alternative for structured data extraction
